stories.title: Family: Busch died from severe pneumonia, sepsis
stories.summary: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, resulting in rapid and overwhelming associated complications, according to a statement released by his family.

stories.title: Reports: Reyna in, Luna out of USMNT WC roster
stories.summary: Gio Reyna will be included in the United States' 2026 World Cup roster, while midfielder Diego Luna is among the notable absentees, according to multiple reports.

stories.title: Liberty's Ionescu to make season debut vs. Wings
stories.summary: Sabrina Ionescu plans to make her season debut Sunday as the Liberty face the Wings.

stories.title: Iran says WC camp moved from U.S to Mexico
stories.summary: The president of the governing body of Iranian soccer said Saturday that the nation's World Cup training base has been moved to Mexico from the United States after getting approval from FIFA.

stories.title: Kane hat trick powers Bayern to German Cup title
stories.summary: Harry Kane hit a hat trick and took his season's tally to 61 goals as Bayern Munich beat Stuttgart 3-0 in the German Cup final to lift the trophy for a 21st time and the first since 2020.
